name: Nostr Watch
description: Auto-start Nostr event watcher that triggers agent workflows on incoming events. Monitors Nostr relays for events (like NIP-17 DMs) and executes custom agent commands via handoff files.

autoStart.description: Automatically start the watcher when the container starts.

kinds.description: Space-separated list of Nostr event kinds to monitor. Default is 1059 (NIP-17 gift-wrapped DMs).

relays.description: Space-separated list of Nostr relay WebSocket URLs.

retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain handoff and seen marker files. Set to -1 to disable time-based cleanup.

maxFilesPerDir.description: Maximum number of files allowed in handoff/seen directories before emergency cleanup. Set to -1 to disable count-based cleanup.

agentCmd.description: Command to execute when a Nostr event is received. The handoff file path is passed as the first argument.

postStartCommand: if [ '${autoStart}' = 'true' ]; then nohup nostr-watch start > /dev/null 2>&1 & fi
